metadata.title: Atasa Education - Overseas Education Consultancy
metadata.description: Consultancy for university education in Turkey, work permits, residence permits, and company formation. Reach your dream education with exam-free and guaranteed processes.

hero.testimonialQuote: "The most professional consultancy team in Turkey. The process was much faster and easier than I expected."
hero.descriptionPrefix: The choice of thousands of students. Reach your dream university education

footer.tagline: Your dreams of studying abroad open the doors to the world.
footer.taglineHighlight: Modern, corporate, and results-oriented consultancy expertise.

about.title: Reach Your Dream Education with {brand}
about.description: We open the doors to education at Turkey's and the world's best universities for students coming from all over the world, especially the Middle East and Central Asia. We stand by you with exam-free transfer and 100% placement guarantee.
about.benefit4: Full support in visa and application processes

services.title: The {highlight} Education Journey in Turkey
services.culturalRichnessDesc: Opportunity to study in Turkey's unique cultural mosaic.
services.qualityEducationDesc: Graduate education at universities with international standards.
services.economicOpportunitiesDesc: Budget-friendly tuition fees and low living costs.
services.easyAccessDesc: Central location at the crossroads of Europe and Asia.

testimonials.title: What Do Students Say About Our University?
testimonials.readExperiences: Read the real experiences of thousands of our clients.
testimonials.review1: Atasa Education made my transition to university life in Turkey easy. The student community here is very friendly and supportive. I am very satisfied with the education system.
testimonials.review2: My university experience in Turkey changed my life. Thanks to the knowledge and experience I gained here, I took a big step in my career. The Atasa Education team was with me every step of the way.

socialProof.title: Community Following Us
socialProof.description: Hundreds of thousands trust us on their education journey. We are also with you on social media.

bursary.title: Step into your dream university education with attractive {highlight} opportunities that open the doors to education in Turkey!

featured.title: Start
featured.description: We have selected the most preferred academic programs of prestigious universities with global recognition for you.

team.title: Meet Our Expert Education Consultants
team.description: Our education consultants provide special support to foreign students in university selection and preparation of application documents in Turkey. We support them in finding the most suitable university for their academic goals and ensuring a smooth application process.

blog.title: Your Guide to Education and Life
